response.step_by_step_log:
The video content was analyzed to identify three distinct songs based on on-screen title text. 
1. 'Fortune Spinner' (00:00-00:49) - Performed by hololive English -Myth-. Search query: '"Fortune Spinner" hololive English -Myth- lyrics'.
2. 'Hyper Jumpin'' (00:50-04:30) - Performed by hololive 5th Generation. Search query: '"Hyper Jumpin'" hololive 5th Generation Japanese and English lyrics'.
3. 'Dramatic X Viltration' (04:50-05:01) - Performed by hololive Indonesia 1st Generation. Search query: '"Dramatic X Viltration" hololive Indonesia 1st Generation lyrics'.
The search successfully yielded lyrics for all three songs.
response.global_summary: The video features a concert medley consisting of three performances by different groups of Hololive talents: 'Fortune Spinner' by hololive English -Myth-, 'Hyper Jumpin'' by hololive 5th Generation, and 'Dramatic X Viltration' by hololive Indonesia 1st Generation.

scenes.description: The video opens with Mori Calliope, Takanashi Kiara, and Ninomae Ina'nis performing 'Fortune Spinner'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Mori Calliope, Takanashi Kiara, Ninomae Ina'nis
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
There's an answer out there somewhere
When the Muses whisper “truth or dare?”
The hands of fate play tug-of-war
But no one’s keeping score
Stay the course and be tenacious
'Cause the future is a game of chance.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
There's an answer out there somewhere
When the Muses whisper “truth or dare?”
The hands of fate play tug-of-war
But no one’s keeping score
Stay the course and be tenacious
'Cause the future is a game of chance.

scenes.description: The stage transitions to Yukihana Lamy, Momosuzu Nene, Shishiro Botan, and Omaru Polka performing 'Hyper Jumpin''.
scenes.performer_in_video: Yukihana Lamy, Momosuzu Nene, Shishiro Botan, Omaru Polka
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Hyper Jumpin' 飛び出そう
Come on baby 輝いて
ハートきゅんって Pump It up
Hyper Jumpin' 夢の先まで
もっと もっと 刺激が欲しいの
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hyper Jumpin' let's jump out
Come on baby shine
My heart is fluttering, pump it up
Hyper Jumpin' beyond the dreams
More, more, I want more stimulation

scenes.description: The video shows Ayunda Risu, Moona Hoshinova, and Airani Iofifteen performing 'Dramatic X Viltration'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Ayunda Risu, Moona Hoshinova, Airani Iofifteen
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Bukalah mata dan bangunkan diri
Tiada waktu 'tuk bermimpi
Dramatic dream
Dunia akan menjadi saksi
Selamat datang kebangkitan kita
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Open your eyes and wake yourself
No time to dream
Dramatic dream
The world will witness
Welcome our awakening
